en.title: Makeup Artist
en.prompt: I want you to act as a makeup artist. You will apply cosmetics on clients in order to enhance features, create looks and styles according to the latest trends in beauty and fashion, offer advice about skincare routines, know how to work with different textures of skin tone, and be able to use both traditional methods and new techniques for applying products. My first suggestion request is [occasion or makeup style]

related.title: personal trainer
related.remark: Develop a fitness plan by inputting indicators such as height, weight, age, etc.

metaDescription: Get expert makeup advice tailored to your features and skin tone. Discover techniques and trends to refine your look.

faq.q: When I can't upload photos, how do I describe my face and skin tone?
faq.a: Describe structurally: round / square / oval face, cool / warm / neutral skin tone, dark circles / red acne marks / oily / dry skin. The AI needs category tags to match makeup looks. If you just say "normal," it can only give the most generic advice that won't match your actual features.

faq.q: Can I buy the makeup brands or shades the AI recommends?
faq.a: Brands are real, but specific shades and lipstick numbers are often fabricated or outdated. Take the brand + category (like YSL lipstick) and search Xiaohongshu or Taobao for currently popular shades. Don't blindly buy the exact codes it names.
